branches.condition: CONC=PBHV OR CONC=CNSC OR CONC=MHCC OR CONC=PC&Y OR CONC=DEVL OR CONC=PSTD OR CONC=PSYW

notes: A minimum of 18 credits in psychology must be taken at
Eastern CT State University.
PSY 227, 247 and 327 must be successfully completed with
a grade of C or better.
All Psychology majors must take the Psychology comprehensive
exam and exit survey  prior to graduation. Students who did not
achieve a satisfactory grade on the comprehensive exam (as
determined by the Department of Psychological Science) must
successfully complete a remedial component before graduation.
